name: Trolley Mass Payouts API
what_it_does: Trolley REST API for mass payout and contractor payment platform with embedded tax compliance. Enables AI agents to manage recipient onboarding and banking detail collection, handle global mass payments via ACH, wire, PayPal, and check, access 1099-NEC and 1042-S tax form generation and filing, retrieve recipient tax identity collection and W-9/W-8 management, manage payment approval and compliance workflows, handle payment status and delivery tracking, access currency conversion for international payments, retrieve payout analytics and reconciliation data, manage white-label payment portal for recipients, and integrate mass payout automation with marketplaces, gig economy platforms, and enterprise AP systems.
use_cases: Managing contractor and freelancer payments from gig platform payout agents
Handling 1099 tax form generation and filing from tax compliance automation agents
Processing marketplace seller payouts from e-commerce platform agents
Integrating global mass payouts with accounting from enterprise AP agents
not_for: Single vendor payments without mass payout scale
Consumer payment processing without B2B payout focus
Payroll processing requiring employer tax compliance beyond 1099 scope
best_when: A marketplace, gig platform, or enterprise using Trolley wants AI agents to automate mass contractor payments, recipient onboarding, 1099/1042-S tax compliance, global payout routing, and reconciliation.
avoid_when: TAX+COMPLIANCE RISK: 1099 and 1042-S automated filing has IRS deadlines and accuracy requirements — incorrect TIN data causes backup withholding. International payments require OFAC and AML screening. Automated payout to mis-onboarded recipients creates tax liability.

auth.notes: Trolley uses API key authentication with HMAC request signing. Account-level API keys with sandbox and production environments. Developer documentation with API reference. Webhooks for payment and recipient events. SDKs for Python, Node.js, PHP, Ruby, Java. White-label recipient portal available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox free; production pricing per payment
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-payment fees vary by method; custom pricing for high volume
pricing.notes: Toronto, Canada. Founded 2015 (formerly Payment Rails). Mass payout platform with embedded tax compliance. 1000+ companies including Shutterstock. 220+ countries, 120+ currencies. 1099-NEC, 1099-MISC, 1042-S, T4A tax form support. Strong gig economy and marketplace focus. Competes with Tipalti and Hyperwallet for mass payouts.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk payment batch processing available

known_agent_gotchas: TAX COMPLIANCE RISK: 1099 filing accuracy — TIN validation must precede payment; incorrect TINs trigger IRS backup withholding
HMAC request signing required — agent must compute signatures correctly; off-by-one timestamp errors cause auth failures
No public MCP server — API key REST API with multi-language SDKs
Recipient onboarding completion required before payment — automated payment to incomplete profiles fails
OFAC screening — international payments screened; flagged recipients require manual review
Tax year deadlines — 1099 and 1042-S have January 31 filing deadlines; automation must account for IRS calendar
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mass payout and tax compliance data. SOC2, PCI-DSS, AML, OFAC. API key + HMAC. US/CA/EU. Contractor PII and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mass payouts and 1099 tax data. SOC2, PCI-DSS, AML, OFAC. API key. US/CA/EU. Contractor PII and payment compliance.
